overview: A ChatGPT-like AI chat interface where anyone can start conversations with an AI, with full chat history saved across sessions. No login required — open to all users.
features: Chat with AI in a familiar ChatGPT-style interface
Chat history saved and persists across page refreshes
Sidebar with all past conversations — click to continue any chat
Start new conversations, rename, or delete old ones
No login required — open to anyone immediately
Loading states and error handling for AI responses
